behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the specific files (Match.tsx, Scripts.test.tsx, solid-router Match.tsx), required strings ('isServer ?? router.isServer', 'useLayoutEffect(() => {', 'prevHrefRef', 'resetKey', 'type: onRendered', 'needs to run'/'committed'), and commands for tests.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required properties/constraints but does not provide exact code; agent must still reason about the implementation structure.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for semantic tokens (useLayoutEffect, return null, prevHrefRef, router.emit) that any correct fix matching the instruction would include; no brittle variable/line assertions.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests invoke subprocess builds and unit tests (test_build_succeeds, test_unit_tests_pass, pass_to_pass tests run pnpm nx) in addition to text checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: Stubs cannot satisfy build+unit test runs (test_unit_tests_pass, test_p2p_repo_unit_tests_ssr) which require the SSR output to actually drop the sentinel script tag.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover: returns null/no script, useLayoutEffect, prevHrefRef, router.emit with onRendered, isServer check, resetKey, SSR test update, solid-router comment update, build+unit pass.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names, docstrings, and a clear section divider for pass-to-pass repo tests.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task modifies source code, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and commands referenced (packages/react-router/src/Match.tsx, pnpm nx run...) are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file Match.tsx but localization to that component is inherent to the task; no line numbers or exact code given.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-only task, not an agentmd-edits/config task.
